case_title: RAYMOND JUI-LIN HSU et al VS. GUIQIN GONG

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,113.00 FILED BY HSU, RAYMOND JUI-LIN LIU, EMMA TALARICO, CHAD TALARICO, WEILING TALARICO, VINCENT TALARICO, SANDRA HSU, PIN-YANG LIU AS TO DEFENDANT GONG, GUIQIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HSU, RAYMOND JUI-LIN LIU, EMMA TALARICO, CHAD TALARICO, WEILING TALARICO, VINCENT TALARICO, SANDRA HSU, PIN-YANG LIU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONG, GUIQIN $70.00 PRINCIPAL, $47.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $117.00, (THE JUDGMENT COMPENSATES, AT $10.00 PER PLAINTIFF, THE BAD MEAL ON DAY 6 OF THE SUBJECT TOUR.) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
